  "name": "pi-a2a-communication",

  "description": "A2A client extension for pi — provides slash commands and tools for A2A v1.0 protocol communication",

  "category": "communication",

    "pi": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=18.0.0"

    "/a2a-agents",

    "/a2a-status",

    "/a2a-server",

    "/a2a-help"

    "Renamed to pi-a2a-communication (client extension identity)",
    "Adding TDD test suite",
    "A2A v1.0 spec compliance fixes (JSON-RPC methods, agent-card path)",
    "Adding SendStreamingMessage SSE support",
    "Adding push notification support",
    "A2A server code retained for local testing only (production gateway is pi-a2a-gateway)"
  ]
}
